content: We can reframe the ICM curiosity mechanism as a built-in self-reflective reward signal generator to augment ReAct and Reflexion reasoning frameworks, enabling open-ended autonomous agents to proactively explore high-uncertainty reasoning paths instead of only following pre-specified task goals. This combination creates a self-improving loop where intrinsic reward for exploring untested reasoning steps iteratively sharpens the agent’s reflective planning over time.
source_topics: agent planning reasoning frameworks ReAct Reflexion
trigger_topic: agent planning reasoning frameworks ReAct Reflexion
